title: 16S V3V4 taxonomic classifiers
author: Polakovicova, Petra
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This dataset provides trained classifiers for taxonomic assignment of 16S rRNA gene amplicon sequences targeting the V3–V4 region. The resources are designed to support multiple commonly used bioinformatics pipelines and classification approaches, enabling consistent and reproducible microbiome analyses across platforms. 
 The dataset includes: 
 
  IDTAXA classifier  (compatible with the DADA2 workflow in R) 
  Naive Bayes classifier for QIIME 2  
  Reference files for  assignTaxonomy   (DADA2-compatible training set) 
  BLAST-based reference database for QIIME 2  
  USEARCH UDB database  for read reorientation and sequence matching 
 
 All classifiers and reference databases were generated specifically for the V3–V4 region of the 16S rRNA gene to ensure optimal taxonomic resolution and compatibility with 341F & 785R primer set.
